productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Love & Luck  Women Perfumes
description: Inspired by an oversize painting by tattoo artist Don ed hardy, this Ed Hardy Love & Luck perfume comes in a cylindrical bottle with the image of a geisha and has a mesmerising flowery fragrance.This Eau De Toilette contains notes of bergamot, blood orange, pink peppercorn, nectarine, jasmine, forbidden plum, sensual musk, cedar wood, sandalwood and patchouli.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
